data.content:
Taylor Brooks
Taylor Brooks is a Software Engineer based in Austin, TX, with experience in building RESTful APIs and dynamic web applications.

NeoCode Labs
NeoCode Labs is the organization where Taylor Brooks is currently employed as a Software Engineer, contributing to software architecture and deployment processes.

Innovent Solutions
Innovent Solutions is the organization where Taylor Brooks previously worked as a Junior Developer, focusing on front-end development and database maintenance.

Austin, TX
Austin, TX, is the geographical location where Taylor Brooks resides and works.

University of Texas at Austin
The University of Texas at Austin is where Taylor Brooks obtained a BSc in Software Engineering.

Software Engineering
Software Engineering is the field of study and work for Taylor Brooks, involving the development of software systems.

RESTful APIs
RESTful APIs are a type of software architecture that Taylor Brooks has experience in building, facilitating communication between software systems.

Morgan Lee
Morgan Lee is a Senior Software Engineer with over 8 years of experience in backend systems, cloud computing, and scalability.

CloudNova Inc.
CloudNova Inc. is an organization where Morgan Lee has worked as a Senior Software Engineer since 2020, focusing on scalable cloud infrastructure design.

Seattle, WA
Seattle, WA, is the location where Morgan Lee worked professionally, both at CloudNova Inc. and CodePeak Systems.

CodePeak Systems
CodePeak Systems is an organization where Morgan Lee worked from 2015 to 2020, focusing on analytics platform development and security protocol enhancements.

University of Washington
The University of Washington is where Morgan Lee completed a Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering from 2011 to 2015.

AWS
AWS refers to Amazon Web Services, which Morgan Lee uses to architect scalable cloud infrastructure.

Java
Java is a programming language that Morgan Lee is skilled in.

Terraform
Terraform is an infrastructure as code software tool utilized by Morgan Lee for cloud management.

MySQL
MySQL is a relational database management system that Morgan Lee has expertise in.

Python
Python is a high-level programming language included in Morgan Lee’s skillset.

Jordan Mitchell
Jordan Mitchell is a Junior Software Engineer and a recent Computer Science graduate with a focus on web development and data structures.

SnapTech Solutions
SnapTech Solutions is an organization where Jordan Mitchell worked as a Software Engineering Intern, focusing on front-end components and optimizing internal tools.

San Francisco, CA
San Francisco, CA is the location where Jordan Mitchell has professional experience.

University of California, Berkeley
The University of California, Berkeley is the institution where Jordan Mitchell completed his BSc in Computer Science.

Computer Science
Computer Science is the academic discipline that Jordan Mitchell studied, providing foundational knowledge for his career in software engineering.
